description: Result of an access evaluation at the economic boundary. v8.5.0 EXTEND adds optional outcome (PolicyDecisionOutcome) + signer_competence_result (SignerCompetenceResult) for authority-cascade composition.

policy_id.description: Which access policy evaluated the request.

denial_reason.description: Why access was denied, populated when granted is false.

outcome.description: Substrate-agnostic outcome enum aligning AccessDecision with the broader v8.5.0 policy-decision vocabulary. Distinct from "granted" (which stays boolean for backward compat) — outcome can be e.g. "needs_review" while "granted" remains false pending review.

signer_competence_result.description: Reference to the Layer-3 evaluation that fed this decision. Threads the authority cascade outcome through the economic boundary so consumers can audit which signer competence decision authorized the access.
